class.name: path_segmentor/PathCorridorLayer
class.description: Marks all costmap cells outside the /plan corridor as LETHAL_OBSTACLE. Corridor half-width is runtime-adjustable via /corridor/width_cmd (clamped to [min_half_width, corridor_half_width]). Publishes /corridor/plan_deviation (Bool) and /corridor/shrink_status (CorridorShrinkStatus) at 10 Hz.
